holdings.infoBox: TSMX is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily TSM Bull 2X ETF (TSMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) stock. TSMX was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., Ltd. Sponsored ADR
